summary: Over the past year, the engineer focused heavily on building a SaaS crypto trading platform, developing embedded firmware for input devices, and conducting deep learning research for crypto price prediction. Additional work spanned Windows kernel drivers, computer vision for poker, Android AI assistants, and various automation and tooling projects.

items.title: Windows input filter driver development
items.description: Built and iterated on a kernel-mode input filtering and injection driver for Windows, adding integration tests and a push-style event delivery library.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform development
items.description: Worked extensively on a crypto algo-trading platform, building out proxy infrastructure, billing models, strategy templates, and a full .NET rewrite with deployment pipelines.

items.title: ESP32-S3 input emulation firmware
items.description: Developed new firmware variants for a feature-rich mouse and keyboard emulation device running on ESP32-S3.

items.title: Windows Explorer file-tagging utility
items.description: Polished a Windows Explorer extension for tagging files and folders, focusing on release workflows and metadata handling.

items.title: Personal CV and input automation project
items.description: Iterated on a computer vision and input automation project, adding aim assist features and overlay improvements.

items.title: Custom e-reader firmware
items.description: Enhanced custom firmware for an e-reader device, adding a map application, knowledge base, and improved book format support.

items.title: Proxy utility fork maintenance
items.description: Updated a forked proxy utility with new transport support and API re-exposures.

items.title: Crypto price prediction model research
items.description: Conducted deep learning research on crypto price prediction, experimenting with mixture-of-experts architectures and model benchmarking.

items.title: Android AI assistant with phone control
items.description: Built an on-device LLM assistant for Android, implementing sub-agent delegation, tool routing strategies, and model management.

items.title: E-ink note-taking launcher
items.description: Developed a minimalist Android launcher centered around note-taking for e-ink devices.

items.title: Code intelligence engine
items.description: Built a graph-powered code intelligence engine with multi-language support and LSP integration for AI agents.

items.title: Neovim configuration and dotfiles
items.description: Maintained a personal Neovim IDE setup and dotfiles, migrating to newer APIs and adding remote clipboard support.

items.title: YOLO labeling tool
items.description: Created a fast, minimalistic on-host labeling tool for YOLO object detection projects.

items.title: Computer vision for online poker
items.description: Developed a computer vision pipeline for analyzing online poker games, focusing on hand reconstruction and state validation.

items.title: Telegram automation node for n8n
items.description: Maintained a fork of a Telegram automation node for n8n, resolving authentication and session storage issues.

items.title: Claude Code n8n integration
items.description: Updated an n8n node for AI coding assistance to use the latest Claude Agent SDK.

items.title: Android task management app
items.description: Worked on a task management application for Android, improving user experience and touch visualization.

items.title: Firmware for ESP32 input devices
items.description: Developed multiple hardware versions of a mouse and keyboard emulation firmware, adding BLE, USB touch, and performance profiles.

items.title: Autonomous AI coding tool
items.description: Contributed to an autonomous multi-session AI coding tool, adding squash merging and worktree management features.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy development
items.description: Created and optimized numerous algorithmic trading strategies for the Freqtrade platform.

items.title: Freqtrade Telegram multi-bot
items.description: Built a Telegram bot interface for managing multiple Freqtrade instances, with a web application and Docker support.

items.title: Flutter trading monitor app
items.description: Developed a mobile monitoring app for trading bots, featuring profit charts and a card-based UI.

items.title: Telegram automation and content collection
items.description: Worked on Telegram-based automation tools for content forwarding, summarization, and multi-target sending.

items.title: Freqtrade strategy hyperoptimization
items.description: Conducted hyperparameter optimization and backtesting for crypto trading strategies.

items.title: AI-powered crypto signaler bot
items.description: Built a Telegram bot that used AI to generate and format crypto trading signals with technical analysis.

items.title: ChatGPT Telegram bot
items.description: Developed a .NET-based Telegram bot for interacting with ChatGPT.
